title: senecio leucus
intro: Senecio leucus, also known as White Groundsel, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems. Senecio leucus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to potential toxicity.
